requirement_topic.en: Battery and power-bank safety testing approach
requirement_topic.zh: 电池与移动电源安全测试要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電池與行動電源安全測試要求

summary.en: For in-scope lithium products, Philippines uses PNS-linked safety expectations with IEC 62133 as the technical basis. Safety evidence should include relevant abuse and functional tests and map to the required mandatory scope before release.
summary.zh: 对落入范围的锂电池和移动电源，菲律宾通常以 PNS 结合 IEC 62133 为技术基础。安全证据应覆盖相关滥用和功能测试，并在入市前映射到对应的强制范围。
summary.zht: 對落入範圍的鋰電池和行動電源，菲律賓通常以 PNS 結合 IEC 62133 作為技術基礎。安全證據應涵蓋相關濫用與功能測試，並在入市前映射到對應強制範圍。

standards_or_laws: PNS requirements supporting lithium battery safety with IEC 62133 principles
BPS scheme evidence and technical documentation requirements
Manufacturer and importer filing expectations for mandatory scope products

summary.en: China applies GB 31241 and related GB/T methods as core safety baselines for lithium cells and batteries. This is a technical base and can support evidence alignment, but it is not a destination legal completion route in the Philippines.
summary.zh: 中国以 GB 31241 和相关 GB/T 方法作为锂电池安全基线，可作为技术证据对齐参考，但它不是菲律宾目的地法律完成路径。
summary.zht: 中國以 GB 31241 和相關 GB/T 方法作為鋰電池安全基線，可作為技術證據對齊參考，但它不是菲律賓目的地法律完成路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287-2019 lithium-ion cells for portable applications

gap.en: The key gap is legal acceptance. Technical reports from China usually require destination-side reframing for Philippine filing, scope confirmation, and model-level traceability before placement.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于法定承认。中国技术报告通常需进行目的地侧重构，以便完成菲律宾备案、范围确认和型号追溯，才能支持市场放行。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於法定承認。中國技術報告通常需進行目的地側重構，以完成菲律賓備案、範圍確認與型號追溯，才能支持市場放行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product model is in the Philippine mandatory scope and BPS safety documentation is required before market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese domestic category requirements where applicable, but not sufficient for Philippine destination release by itself.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese safety evidence is useful engineering input. Destination compliance in the Philippines still requires in-scope BPS/PNS mapping and importer-facing filing, not only lab reports from China.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国安全证据是技术支撑，但菲律宾目的地合规仍要求对应的 BPS/PNS 范围映射和进口方备案，不只是中国实验室报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國安全證據是技術支撐，但菲律賓目的地合規仍要求對應的 BPS/PNS 範圍映射和進口方備案，不只是中國實驗室報告。
